description: Style Note Updated summer style for your feet with catwalk's latest line. Inspired by the fresh fashion fetishes this season, this pair of sandals exemplify versatility - they look good with everything from smart formal day wear to breezy spring separates. Style them with an all-pastel coloured ensembles or a colour pop one, they go well with both! Product Description Gladiator style sandal with thin straps across the midfoot and forefoot Bead detailing along the length of the foot at the centre An ankle length heel collar with a zipper TPU outsole with branded grooves and a floral lug at the heel Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
